layout.container: w-full min-h-screen bg-[#0D0F14] text-white p-2 md:p-4 lg:p-6
layout.card: bg-[#161A22] border border-[#232B36] rounded-md p-4 md:p-6 flex flex-col

buttons.primary: bg-[#3B8BD4] text-white hover:bg-[#2A75B8] rounded-sm px-4 py-2 font-medium transition-colors
buttons.outline: border border-[#232B36] text-[#94A3B8] hover:text-white hover:bg-[#1E2430] rounded-sm px-4 py-2 transition-colors
buttons.danger: bg-transparent border border-[#E24B4A]/50 text-[#E24B4A] hover:bg-[#E24B4A]/10 rounded-sm px-4 py-2

gauges.circular_temp: Custom SVG or Recharts radial bar. Base track #232B36, value track dynamically colored (green/amber/red). Include a centered large metric readout.
gauges.potency_arc: Semi-circle SVG gauge. Gradient from #1D9E75 to #E24B4A, representing viable vs. degraded states.

charts.styling: Dark grid lines (stroke: #232B36), transparent backgrounds. Tooltips must use #161A22 background with #232B36 border and white text. For the 60-min temp chart, use <ReferenceArea> to shade the 2-8°C safe band in subtle green (#1D9E75 with low opacity). For TF.js regression, use <Area> for confidence bands with 0.1 opacity.

maps.styling: Use CartoDB Dark Matter tile layer: 'https://{s}.basemaps.cartocdn.com/dark_all/{z}/{x}/{y}{r}.png'. Markers should be custom divIcons utilizing Tailwind's ping/pulse animations for a radar-like feel.

status_indicators.badge: px-2 py-1 rounded-sm text-xs font-mono border

motion.pulse: animate-pulse (vital for all live data indicators to simulate active monitoring)

accessibility.contrast: Ensure minimum 4.5:1 ratio for text against #161A22.
accessibility.aria: Use aria-live='polite' for live metric updates and Sonner toast notifications.

testing.data_testid_rules: All interactive elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., data-testid='vaccine-selector', data-testid='export-csv-btn', data-testid='temp-gauge').

image_urls.description: Abstract neon lines forming a digital landscape

instructions_to_main_agent: INSTALL DEPENDENCIES: yarn add recharts leaflet react-leaflet @tensorflow/tfjs @phosphor-icons/react clsx tailwind-merge framer-motion sonner
Do NOT use HTML-based components for advanced user interactions. Heavily customize Shadcn components to fit the 1px border, flat card, control-room aesthetic.
The layout MUST use CSS Grid (e.g., grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4) with Mode B 'Control Room' rules.
Include 'data-testid' on all buttons, select inputs, tabs, and major cards.
Integrate Web Audio API for a subtle ping on critical alerts, paired with a Sonner toast notification.
Ensure 'Inter', 'Roboto', 'Open Sans', 'Lato', 'Syne', and 'Space Grotesk' are NOT used. Apply 'Barlow' for headings and 'IBM Plex Sans' for body text via Google Fonts.
Borders should be solid and thin (1px). Remove any Shadcn default soft shadows, replacing them with sharp flat design elements.
